title: Stablecoin Market to Hit $2 Trillion in 2028 Even as Velocity Doubles: Standard Chartered
snippet: Standard Chartered says stablecoin velocity has doubled in two years, driven by USDC's new use cases in TradFi and AI payments.

title: Convera taps Ripple for stablecoin-based cross-border payments
snippet: Convera, a global leader in commercial payments, today announced a new strategic collaboration with Ripple, a leading provider of blockchain-based enterprise solutions across traditional and digital finance, to offer crypto-enabled payment and treasury solutions for businesses.

title: BMO introduces tokenized cash and deposit platform with CME Group and Google Cloud
snippet: BMO, in collaboration with CME Group and Google Cloud, today announced plans to introduce new 24/7 tokenized cash capabilities that will allow institutional clients to move value more easily and securely using CME Group's permissioned network on Google Cloud Universal Ledger (GCUL).

title: Fed’s Barr invokes ‘long and painful history’ while encouraging strong stablecoin oversight
snippet: Michael Barr called for for regulatory and technological measures that ensure stablecoins will not be used for illicit activities.

title: MiCA-licensed crypto asset manager Tesseract unveils compliance-minded yield vaults
snippet: Tesseract tested its vault architecture with six pilot participants, including crypto ETP issuer 21Shares.

title: Plume pilots payroll system allowing employees to receive part of salary in WisdomTree tokenized fund
snippet: Plume has launched a payroll pilot that lets employees receive part of their salary in tokenized money-market fund shares.

title: Exclusive: Former a16z crypto investor raises $10 million to launch stablecoin clearinghouse Better Money - Fortune
snippet: Exclusive: Former a16z crypto investor raises $10 million to launch stablecoin clearinghouse Better Money Fortune

title: ‘Unstable velocity’: Standard Chartered says stablecoin usage rising faster than expected as new use cases emerge
snippet: The bank maintained its $2 trillion stablecoin market cap forecast by 2028 amid a sharp increase in turnover from use cases like AI payments.

title: Europe risks ‘digital dollarization’ as banks race to launch euro stablecoin - CoinDesk
snippet: Europe risks ‘digital dollarization’ as banks race to launch euro stablecoin CoinDesk

title: OpenFX raises $94M to speed up cross-border payments with stablecoins
snippet: OpenFX raised $94 million in a Series A round to expand its stablecoin-based FX network, as firms explore faster cross-border payment infrastructure.

title: Chainalysis introduces ‘blockchain intelligence agents’ trained on millions of investigations
snippet: The autonomous bots are trained on Chainalysis' massive, proprietary dataset built from over a decade in business.

title: Stablecoins endanger US economy, warns Fed governor. ‘Long and painful history of private money’
Tether's USAT Stablecoin Expands Beyond Ethereum Mainnet to Celo
snippet: The Tether-backed USAT stablecoin built for the U.S. market is expanding to Ethereum layer-2 network Celo with help from Google Cloud.

title: E-commerce giant Mercado Libre to sunset rewards-based Mercado Coin: Report
snippet: The closure of Mercado Coin doesn't mark the end of Mercado Libre's crypto rewards strategy as it still offers the Meli Dolar (MUSD), a US-dollar stablecoin which launched in 2024.

title: BitGo launches portfolio-based crypto lending platform for institutions
snippet: The platform lets institutions borrow and lend against liquid, staked and locked assets within BitGo’s custody, consolidating collateral management in one account.

title: FX payments startup OpenFX raises $94 million amid cross-border stablecoin push - Reuters
snippet: FX payments startup OpenFX raises $94 million amid cross-border stablecoin push Reuters

title: Interactive Brokers launches crypto trading in EEA, including BTC, ETH, SOL and XRP
snippet: Interactive Brokers launched crypto trading for eligible EEA investors, offering 11 cryptocurrencies alongside stocks and futures.

title: Circle Joins Canton Network as Super Validator Unlocking Private USDC Settlement - CoinGape
snippet: Circle Joins Canton Network as Super Validator Unlocking Private USDC Settlement CoinGape

title: Hong Kong hasn’t issued a single HKD stablecoin license after March target

Australia passes crypto regulation requiring exchanges to obtain financial services licenses
Benchmark initiates coverage on Securitize, calls it a ‘picks and shovels’ play for tokenization
snippet: Securitize’s business model ties revenue to tokenized asset growth and activity across issuance, trading and servicing.

title: Coinbase’s Base to focus on tokenized markets, stablecoins, developers this year
Chainalysis to add ‘blockchain intelligence’ agents to platform
snippet: The analytics platform said it would begin rolling out the agents over the summer for use in investigations and compliance.

title: A16z crypto leads $10 million round in startup developing stablecoins’ missing layer
snippet: The Better Money Company said it will work with Paxos, Bridge, MoonPay, MetaMask, and Phantom, among others.

title: If You Hold Solana on Magic Eden's Wallet, It's Time to Move It or Lose It
snippet: Support for Magic Eden's crypto wallet is ending soon, meaning users will have to export their private keys to avoid losing access to funds.

title: Latin America’s Mercado Libre Pulls the Plug on Its Crypto Coin
snippet: Latin America's e-commerce giant Mercado Libre quietly killed its Mercado Coin loyalty token—pivoting to its own stablecoin.

title: Stablecoins expected to grow five-fold to $2tn by 2028. Here’s what’s super-charging the growth
The stablecoin question is: Who gets paid?
snippet: Stablecoin infrastructure delivers velocity but issuers and exchanges capture the rent. Velocity beats market cap as digital dollars become invisible financial plumbing.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
snippet: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: AI agents like OpenClaw could drain crypto wallets via ‘malicious skills’: CertiK
snippet: CertiK has advised ordinary users “who are not security professionals, developers, or experienced geeks” against installing and using OpenClaw.
